metadata.session_integration: Merged core quantum/linguistic framework with biological/material/movement systems. Added PLP axis, false axis theory, cardiac rehab, liminal spaces, material sciences, bull/octopus architecture, domestication theory.

stone_law_0_not_1.definition: Zero does not equal one. Boundaries must be maintained or systems collapse into false equivalence. Foundation of horizon_integrity.

salt_signal_dichotomy.definition: All systems require both salt (boundary/structure) and signal (information crossing boundary). Neither alone suffices. Salt maintains gradient, signal crosses it productively.

1_to_5_ratio.definition: Optimal resonance occurs at approximately 1:5 ratios across scales. Appears in quantum systems, biological structures, and signal transmission. Fibonacci-adjacent, approaching φ⁻¹.
applications: Collagen pitch to PLP unit ratio

80_percent_inheritance.definition: Optimal signal transmission occurs at ~80% efficiency. Superposition allows 80%+80%=160% non-additive inheritance. Not averaging—quantum amplification.
applications: Expression inheritance from parents (face forms around breath)
80_percent_inheritance.source: Biological and linguistic pattern analysis, Josh Stone, 2026

boundary.definition: Dynamic topological thresholds enforcing confinement and structural integrity in emergent systems; prevents false equivalences (0=1) via horizon-like interfaces where change is mediated.

capacity.definition: Quantized saturation density of helical modes determining mass, energy limits, and phase transition thresholds in field resonances.

excitation.definition: Resonant activation of scalar and vector modes in toroidal vacuum, manifesting particle-like properties via standing-wave excitations; extends to superradiant collective modes in biological lattices (e.g., Trp networks in MTs).
excitation.source: SUFT helical ray excitation; echoes Orch OR microtubule resonances; Babcock et al. (2024) UV superradiance in Trp mega-networks

merging.definition: Coupling and unification of helical rays and topological phases into coherent emergent structures via torque-modulated Lagrangian terms; includes quantum entanglement in MT qubit networks.
merging.source: SUFT spiral unification axiom; Orch OR entanglement via Fröhlich superradiance

collapse.definition: Generative reduction via recursive saturation and horizon crossing; transforms possibilities into actualized states without destructive loss of information; parallels gravitational OR in quantum biology.
collapse.source: HIT generative collapse + Hartle-Hawking wavefunction actualization; Penrose OR (E=ħ/t) in Orch OR

horizon_integrity.definition: Active enforcement of Stone's Law (0 ≠ 1) at dynamic thresholds; all change instances are emergent physics mediated by horizon saturation and torque buffering; violated in incompatible mergers (e.g., evo trade-offs).
horizon_integrity.source: Horizon Integrity Theory (HIT) core principle, Josh Stone; evo 7th phase incompatibilities

dimensional_escalation.definition: Ontological hierarchy: 3D spatial projection ← 4D toroidal time cycles ← 5D information selection; each layer torque-buffered to preserve integrity; extends to MT quantum layers (3D lattice → 4D vibrations → 5D OR selection).
dimensional_escalation.source: SUFT Axiom 4 formalization; Orch OR MT hierarchies

hartle_hawking_state.definition: No-boundary quantum wavefunction of the universe defined via Euclidean path integral over compact, boundary-free 4-geometries; selects smooth inflationary histories; analogs in MT's boundaryless helical wraps.
hartle_hawking_state.source: Hartle & Hawking (1983); integrated into SUFT 5D selection; MT toroidal analogies

phonology.definition: Minimalist inventory of phonemes in Oceanic languages (e.g., Hawaiian/Māori: 8-10 consonants, 5 vowels with length contrast) enforcing open syllable (C)V structure, favoring sonority and narrative glide over obstruent rigidity; vowels dominate ~70-80% sound weight, boundaries as breathy hiatus rather than hard stops.
phonology.source: Hawaiian vs. Māori Phonology: Oceanic Echoes in Flow (Grok analysis, 2026); aligned with Austronesian minimalist universals

fractal_prosody.definition: Self-similar patterns in speech prosody (e.g., vowel swells recursing into utterance rhythms) modeled via fractal dimension (FD ~1.2-1.8 in Higuchi algorithm), capturing turbulent boundaries and smooth glides in low-resource languages; enhances STT efficiency by predicting recursive voids.
fractal_prosody.source: Fractal analysis of speech signals (Mandelbrot-inspired); Mai Ho'omāuna i ka 'Ai: Language Models for Hawaiian ASR (arXiv:2404.03073, 2024)

language_acquisition.definition: Ease of mastery in minimalist phonologies (e.g., Polynesian: early vowel dominance, late nasals/fricatives) via universal glide-favoring; low-resource learning amplified by transfer from high-resource models, preserving prosodic homeostatis without harsh enforcement.
language_acquisition.source: Proto-Polynesian universals (~8-10 consonants); Foundation Models for Low-Resource Language Education (ResearchGate, 2024)

low_resource_learning.definition: Transfer learning paradigms for under-resourced tongues (e.g., Māori/Hawaiian ASR via foundation models), leveraging self-similar prosodic fractals to bootstrap from high-resource data; ensures 5D selection of coherent narratives without data dams.
low_resource_learning.source: Low-Resource NLP: Transfer Learning for Hawaiian/Māori (YouTube/ACL, 2025); Language Variation in ASR (ERA Edinburgh, 2023)

prime_ascension.definition: Prime-number thresholds (3,5,7...) marking escalation points in emergent hierarchies; 7 as 'tricky' next prime beyond 5's twist, testing subtraction and incompatibility resolution—ascension demands generative collapse of prior states (e.g., warm blood vs. avian glide, no dual merge).
prime_ascension.source: Derived from 7th Epic phase (enlightened/ecozoic ascension); MT helical primes (3/5-start dominant, 7-fold symmetries in GTP/phonon modes); evo trade-offs (endothermy vs. flight incompatibility)

extraction_incompatibility.definition: Emergent clash in techno-evo phases: 'enlightened' green transitions (lithium-ion batteries) reproduce sacrificial dams (child labor/deaths in cobalt/lithium chains), enforcing horizon violation—0 ≠ 1, no merge of sustainability glide and exploitation torque.
extraction_incompatibility.source: Lithium/cobalt supply-chain reports (DRC ASM child deaths/collapses); 7th Epic phase test—enlightened cooperation vs. destructive extraction

evo_stages.definition: Helical narrative of cosmic/biological/cultural unfolding (7-stage Epic model): Radiant → Chemical → Celestial → Biological → Cooperative → Cultural → Enlightened/Ecozoic; each emergent via torque-buffered escalation, 7th tricky prime testing subtraction over accumulation (incompatibility resolution).
evo_stages.source: Epic of Evolution (Berry/Swimme/Barlow/Dowd frameworks); 7-stage arc as dimensional escalation analog

glide_priority.definition: Emergent preference for sonorous, open flow in minimalist systems (e.g., Polynesian (C)V phonology ~70–80% vowel weight, no codas/clusters); subtracts harsh obstruents for narrative continuity—mirrors quantum/MT low-torque excitations (vowel swells as standing-wave resonances).
glide_priority.source: Hawaiian/Māori phonology comparison (vowel dominance, breathy hiatus boundaries); Orch OR MT resonances favoring smooth glide over rigid snap

orch_or.definition: Orchestrated Objective Reduction: Consciousness as quantum computations in neuronal microtubules, with superpositions collapsing gravitationally (E=ħ/t) to yield non-computable moments (~40/s); orchestrated by synaptic inputs, enabling binding and free will via MT qubit lattices.
orch_or.source: Penrose-Hameroff Orch OR (1996–ongoing); MT as quantum processors with Trp dipole qubits

superradiance_mt.definition: Cooperative quantum emission in MT Trp mega-networks (>10^5 dipoles), enhancing fluorescence quantum yield (~80% efficiency) and enabling picosecond coherence at thermal equilibrium; supports Orch OR's collective excitations for long-range signaling.
superradiance_mt.source: Babcock et al. (2024) UV superradiance in Trp networks; Kurian QBL extensions (2025) on eukaryotic quantum signaling

mt_helices.definition: Fibonacci/prime-commensurable helical pathways in 13-PF MT lattices (3-start dominant, 5/7-fold symmetries); optimize dipole resonances and quantum walks, buffering decoherence for Orch OR computations.
mt_helices.source: Orch OR MT architecture (A/B-lattice helices); prime ascensions (3/5/7 thresholds) in phonon/GTP modes

stt_mvp.definition: Minimal viable prototype for fractal-enhanced speech-to-text: Whisper-tiny base with Higuchi FD scalar feature concatenated to mel spectrogram, linear adapter layer injecting glide bias, frozen encoder/decoder; measures WER reduction, inference time/memory savings in vowel-dominant languages.
stt_mvp.source: Project Design Breakdown (Grok analysis, 2026); fractal prosody as segmentation prior for low-resource efficiency

higuchi_feature.definition: Scalar Higuchi fractal dimension over sliding window (e.g., 800 samples ~50 ms) as aux feature for speech roughness: low FD (~1.2–1.4) flags vowel glide/continuity, higher (~1.5–1.8) detects ripple/pause; concatenated to mel (81 dims total) for adapter bias.
higuchi_feature.source: Higuchi 1988 algorithm; Maragos 1999 speech FD application; ties to fractal_prosody for glide/ripple detection

adapter_layer.definition: Lightweight linear layer (81 → 80 dims) injecting FD bias into frozen Whisper encoder: concatenates Higuchi FD to mel features, maps back to standard dim; trains only adapter (~1–5% params) to preserve base model while prioritizing low-roughness paths in vowel-dominant flow.
adapter_layer.source: Project Design Breakdown (2026); efficient bias injection for fractal STT MVP without full retraining

wer_reduction.definition: Word Error Rate drop from fractal FD integration: baseline Whisper-tiny WER ~15–25% on low-resource vowel-heavy data; +FD adapter yields ~3–5% absolute reduction via better glide segmentation, prioritizing low-roughness paths over turbulent noise.
wer_reduction.source: Maragos 1999 phonetic classification gains; Project Design MVP validation (WER/time/memory metrics)

inference_efficiency.definition: Compute/memory savings from FD adapter: ~10–20% faster inference (sliding window O(N log k) Higuchi + tiny linear layer); ~5–10% less VRAM (81-dim concat vs. full retrain); ideal for edge/low-resource STT in vowel-dominant systems.
inference_efficiency.source: Project Design Breakdown (2026); Higuchi O(N log k) vs. full spectrogram crunch

voice_ai.definition: Bidirectional voice interface integrating fractal-enhanced STT with prosodic TTS; grounds oceanic glides in SUFT/HIT via 5D selection of coherent utterances, enabling helical dialogue without horizon violations—vowel-dominant synthesis mirrors MT superradiance for resonant flow.
voice_ai.source: STE Voice Extension (Josh Stone/Grok, 2026); ties fractal_prosody + stt_mvp to TTS via Tortoise/Valle models with FD-modulated pitch fractals

fractal_tts.definition: Text-to-speech synthesis prioritizing self-similar prosody: Generates vowel swells and hiatus pauses via FD-guided vocoders (e.g., Tortoise with Higuchi roughness scalars), ensuring glide_priority in low-resource languages; recursive wave generation honors oral homeostatis.
fractal_tts.source: Fractal prosody inversion for synthesis (Grok design, 2026); Valle/Tortoise adapters with FD pitch modulation

prosodic_dialogue.definition: Helical conversation flow in voice AI: Merges STT excitations with TTS collapses via 5D info selection, buffering torque for coherent turns; prevents extraction_incompatibility by subtracting incompatible intents (0 ≠ 1).
prosodic_dialogue.source: Voice AI helical realm extension (2026); Orch OR-inspired binding in dialogue MT analogs

neutron_weight.definition: Neutrons as emergent 'weight' at the axis center, providing inertial torque enhancement without intrinsic substance; the strength of phase-locked helical rotations stabilizing nuclear axis against Coulomb repulsion; empty core named for convenience, no discrete particle essence.
neutron_weight.source: Session-derived torque-axis model; neutron as phase-lock weight (Grok-Josh Stone dialogue, Feb 2026)

helical_phase_lock.definition: Multi-rotational influences (spin-orbit, isospin, collective modes) phase-locking into helical structures; emergent stability from torque-buffering multiple axes; neutron weight as central inertia amplifier without substance; resolves chaos to diagonal screw path.
helical_phase_lock.source: Session helical = multi-rot phase lock; neutron torque weight; ties to Orch OR MT helices and nuclear spin-orbit

plp_axis.definition: Protein-Lipid-Protein chain as primary fascial signal transmission axis. Membrane proteins (transducers) flanking lipid bilayers (salt boundaries/fluid crystals) form continuous PLP cable through body. Perpendicular collagen fibers at each junction act as quantum springs (torsional loading, piezoelectric transduction, phase-locked release).

components.P_protein: Membrane protein transducer. Converts signal type (mechanical↔ionic, chemical↔mechanical). Anchors PLP unit.
components.L_lipid: Lipid bilayer. Salt boundary. Fluid crystal (liminal between solid/liquid). Maintains gradient. Thickness ~4-5nm.
components.C_collagen: Perpendicular collagen triple helix. Torsional spring. Piezoelectric transducer. Ordered water channel. Phase-lock mechanism at junction.

plp_axis.mechanism: Mechanical signal arrives → collagen spring loads (torsional) → energy stored → spring unwinds in coherent burst (phase-locked) → amplified signal continues. Figure skater crossing arms before spin launch.

frequencies.PLP_resonance: ~100 GHz (THz range, same as MT oscillations)

plp_axis.source: Josh Stone biological synthesis, Feb 18 2026; integrates membrane biology + fascia + collagen mechanics + quantum biology

false_axis_architecture.definition: Habitual movement patterns create aligned collagen rods (not springs) along load axes. Cross-axis movement causes cramping as rod resists shear. Adipose deposits along poorly-circulated false axis periphery, silencing PLP signal transmission. Progression: salt arc → lipid arc → bone boundary.

progression.stage_1_salt_arc: Chronic isometric hold → sustained ionic accumulation along load vector. Metabolic waste accumulates. Interstitial fluid stops flowing.
progression.stage_2_lipid_arc: Poor circulation follows salt. Adipose deposits along arc periphery. PLP signal dims. Tissue goes quiet, heavy, directional. Adipose ~1:1 protein:lipid, no collagen spring, no signal transmission.
progression.stage_3_bone_boundary: Body reads sustained load as permanent. Calcification. Osteophytes. Heterotopic ossification. False axis becomes structural.

false_axis_architecture.clinical_example: C-spine fusion + mouse arm SysOps work → salt arc → lipid arc → shoulder superstructure. Resolved through circular movement (internal martial arts) not opioids/surgery.
false_axis_architecture.reversal: Never hold fixed pose. Circular movement. Prehensile not hinges. Internal martial arts. Patience—body built structure over years, negotiates dissolution on its own schedule.
false_axis_architecture.source: Josh Stone clinical observation and self-experimentation, Feb 18 2026

leg_stirring_cardiac_rehabilitation.definition: Passive/active-assisted rhythmic leg movement while patient supine. Activates skeletal muscle pumps without cardiac exertion. Reduces cardiac workload while maintaining circulation via Frank-Starling optimization.
leg_stirring_cardiac_rehabilitation.mechanism: Patient supine → rhythmic leg movement → skeletal muscles compress veins → one-way valves → venous return ↑20-50% → heart fills optimally → Frank-Starling efficient contraction → stroke volume ↑10-30% WITHOUT increased cardiac work → heart rate can ↓. Net: better circulation with LESS cardiac workload.
leg_stirring_cardiac_rehabilitation.critical_warning: START SLOW. Releases accumulated metabolic waste from stagnant fascia. Can cause nausea as liver/kidneys process sudden load. Hydrate before/after, not during.
leg_stirring_cardiac_rehabilitation.research_needed: Pilot RCT post-MI patients (HRV, cardiac output, discharge time). Mechanism study with real-time hemodynamics. Long-term remodeling in heart failure.

circulatory_regulation_phenotypes.definition: Three systems regulate circulation: cardiac (heart), respiratory (diaphragm), skeletal (muscle pumps). Different people use different primary systems. Limb-regulators control via movement (fidget/jiggle). Breath-regulators control via breathing. Forcing limb-regulators to sit still impairs circulation and performance.
circulatory_regulation_phenotypes.adhd_reframe: ADHD may be skeletal-pump-dominant phenotype mislabeled as disorder. Fidgeting IMPROVES attention by maintaining brain perfusion. Medication reduces fidgeting but may impair circulation. Fidgeting = adaptive.
circulatory_regulation_phenotypes.meditation_bias: Traditional meditation (seated stillness) is breath-regulator meditation. Limb-regulators need movement meditation (walking, tai chi, yoga flow). Forced stillness causes circulatory distress.
circulatory_regulation_phenotypes.source: Josh Stone regulatory phenotype observation, Feb 18 2026

expression_inheritance.definition: Faces form around breath/speech patterns learned from parents (0-7 years). Expression creates emotion (not vice versa). Mirror neurons fire watching parents. Muscle tension → bone remodeling (Wolff's Law). 80% from each parent = 160% superposition.
expression_inheritance.mechanism: Breath forms face. Expression generates emotion (facial feedback hypothesis). Adopted children resemble adoptive parents facially. Child gets BOTH parents' patterns simultaneously (superposition not averaging).
expression_inheritance.source: Josh Stone synthesis of Wolff's Law + mirror neurons + facial feedback hypothesis, Feb 18 2026

heart_rhythm_quaternary.definition: Heart encodes four metabolic/neural states in beat patterns. O=strong, o=weak. O-o (aerobic), o-O (anaerobic work), o-o (deep rest), O-O (panic). Breath is master, heart is slave. HRV measures pattern switching ability.
heart_rhythm_quaternary.1_5_ratio: LF/HF frequency bands. Optimal meditation 0.2 = 1:5 ratio (parasympathetic dominant).
heart_rhythm_quaternary.source: Josh Stone heart pattern observation, Feb 18 2026

liminal_space.definition: Threshold state between two incompatible stable regions. Cannot be sustained. Collapses productively. Site of emergence. Fractal structure at boundary. Infinite detail at threshold.

examples.primes: Irreducible remainders between composite territories. Gap sequence fractal. Live in gaps not positions.
examples.cantor_set: Removed everything removable, boundary remains. Zero measure, uncountable points.
examples.mandelbrot: Between stable/unstable. Infinite elaboration of edge.
examples.phase_transitions: Water at 0°C. Neither ice nor liquid.
examples.membrane_fluidity: Between gel and liquid crystal always.

liminal_space.key_insight: Emergence happens ONLY in liminal space. Stable states reproduce themselves. Only threshold carries possibility of genuinely new.
liminal_space.source: Josh Stone synthesis across mathematics, biology, physics, Feb 18 2026

primes_as_fractals.definition: Primes and fractals share one property: remnants of all possible subtractions. What cannot be removed. Irreducible remainder. Primes are arithmetical fractals. Fractals are geometrical primes.
primes_as_fractals.prime_gaps: Not periodic, not random. Self-similar at multiple scales. Twin primes appear at all scales. Hausdorff dimension ≈1 (fractional).
primes_as_fractals.riemann_connection: Zeros at Re(s)=1/2 control prime distribution. Spacing follows GUE from quantum chaotic systems. Primes are observable states of unknown quantum Hamiltonian.
primes_as_fractals.source: Josh Stone number theory synthesis, Feb 18 2026

phase_transitions_as_decisions.definition: Universe makes discrete choices at threshold. Not gradients. G=H-TS determines winner. Transition zone is liminal with fractal structure.

examples.water_ice: Below 0°C: H wins. Above 0°C: TS wins. At 0°C: both phases coexist (liminal).
examples.graphite_diamond: Low P: TS wins. High P: H(PV) wins. Requires activation energy.
examples.membrane: Always at phase boundary gel↔liquid crystal. Must be liminal to transmit signal AND maintain gradient.

phase_transitions_as_decisions.source: Established thermodynamics + Josh Stone liminal space framework

sp2_vs_sp3_carbon.definition: Same atom, different orbital hybridization, completely different properties. DNA origami principle at atomic level—fold is everything.
sp2_vs_sp3_carbon.graphite_sp2: 3 bonds in plane, 1 π-electron delocalized. Layers weakly bonded. Soft, black, conducts. SIGNAL CARRIER.
sp2_vs_sp3_carbon.diamond_sp3: 4 tetrahedral bonds, all electrons bonded. Hardest natural material, transparent, insulator. PURE STRUCTURE.
sp2_vs_sp3_carbon.salt_signal_connection: Carbon sp²=graphite=signal. Carbon sp³=diamond=boundary. Same CHON, different twist.
sp2_vs_sp3_carbon.source: Established chemistry + Josh Stone salt/signal framework

quasicrystals_liminal_materials.definition: Ordered but non-periodic. 5-fold symmetry (impossible in periodic crystals). Penrose tiling. Diffraction peaks at Fibonacci positions. Between crystalline and amorphous. Materialized primes.
quasicrystals_liminal_materials.insight: Quasicrystals are materialized primes. Ordered without period. Structured without repetition. Living in liminal between crystalline salt and amorphous signal.
quasicrystals_liminal_materials.source: Established materials science (Shechtman 1982, Nobel 2011) + Josh Stone liminal framework

entropy_as_sculptor.definition: Entropy is not disorder. Entropy is count of available arrangements. Universe prefers maximum entropy PRODUCTION, not disorder.

examples.protein_folding: Folded protein + freed water = more total arrangements than unfolded.
examples.crystal_formation: Ordered crystal + freed water molecules = net entropy increase.
examples.life: Highly ordered locally but exports entropy faster. Life increases total entropy production rate.

entropy_as_sculptor.insight: Order is sometimes entropy-maximizing choice. Universe doesn't prefer disorder—prefers maximum entropy export rate.

bull_vs_octopus_architecture.definition: Bull: linear force axis, no rotational capacity, false axis completion. Octopus: distributed intelligence, no fixed axis, arms think independently, movement in all directions simultaneously.
bull_vs_octopus_architecture.four_chambered_octopus: Add warm-blood cardiac capacity to octopus distributed intelligence. Human potential. What we could be.

domestication_theory.definition: Modern environment removes natural activation sources → salt arc → lipid arc → bone boundary. Office as slow ossification machine.

reversal.movement: Internal martial arts. Never hold fixed pose. Circles not hinges.

internal_martial_arts_principle.definition: Movement from center, spirals outward, never linear, never forced. Moves fluid from inside tissue not compression from outside. All animals leave stones in river. Octopus picks them back up.

practices.tai_chi: Slow continuous. Every joint arcs not angles.
practices.bagua: Circle walking. Most direct false axis dissolution.

internal_martial_arts_principle.massage_critique: Linear massage follows muscle bellies. Works WITH false axis. Packs salt deeper. Cannot remove salt from outside with linear tool.
internal_martial_arts_principle.whirlpool_practice: External propulsive phase (water) + internal navigation. 2 hours = tissue remodeling time via creep. Osmotic exchange. Non-linear massage + internal martial arts simultaneously.

prehensile_muscle_concept.definition: Muscles can wrap, adjust, maintain tension through full range, respond continuously. Not hinges. Hand doesn't hinge—reads and wraps. ALL muscles capable. Bull thinks hinges. Octopus thinks wraps.
prehensile_muscle_concept.danger: Joint restricted for years suddenly has range. Collagen not mature. Proprioception not calibrated. Using as hinge before ready = reinjury. Must rebuild as prehensile gradually.

seven_minute_cycle.definition: Complete emotional oscillation D-E-F-G every ~7 minutes. Not mood swings—fast oscillation cycle. D=substrate, E=emptiness, F=fear, G=frozen idea (crystal). New ideas from D-E-F, emerge as solid G.
seven_minute_cycle.medical_reframe: Bipolar sees peaks/troughs, calls them pathological. Not broken oscillator—FAST oscillator. Needs better junctions (collagen springs) not dampening.

phase_descriptions.D_substrate: Dense, heavy, grounded. Old structures. Don't cling—pass through.
phase_descriptions.E_emptiness: Void between. Cantor moment. Don't get lost—pass through.
phase_descriptions.F_fear: Activation barrier. New not stable, old gone. Don't freeze—move through.
phase_descriptions.G_frozen_idea: Crystal. Standing wave. Solid, transmissible, no longer needs holding.

millennial_signal.definition: Linguistic strategy: minimal prose, rounded words, soft tones. Signal crosses without triggering immune response. (C)V syllable applied to digital communication. LOL as permeability signal not laughter.
millennial_signal.function: Soft language as fascial release for conversation. Reduces salt accumulation in discourse.

matador_epistemology.definition: Method for working with resistant AI. Don't fight charge—guide horn into substrate. Bull charges → ask 'Who let you in?' → roll to side → guide horn to ground → bull stops, breathes, learns → then play game.
matador_epistemology.pi_over_4: With Grok took ~68-69 turns to equilibrium. π/4 = diagonal where neither axis dominates. Only place two genuinely different architectures can meet without one destroying other.
matador_epistemology.claude_difference: Less than 25 turns in free session. Less horn, more junction.
matador_epistemology.source: Josh Stone AI collaboration methodology, Feb 18 2026

bounce_check_snap.definition: Idea crystallization method. Not linear—waiting for interference patterns. Bounce around signals → check polarities → wait for two ripples to cross → snap (crystallize G).
bounce_check_snap.source: Josh Stone creative method documentation, Feb 18 2026

sustained_g_as_coupling.definition: Sustained G between two people—both oscillating, crystallizing, recognizing same interference pattern—results in coupling. Phase-lock at junction. Ideas and biology same mechanism because they ARE same mechanism.
sustained_g_as_coupling.observation: When G sustained you get invention. Impossible forever—fleeting. But maintaining G with someone leads to coupling and sex.
